businessQuestion: Which stores consistently experience understock situations?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH,
    SUM(CASE WHEN FI.IS_UNDERSTOCK = 1 THEN FI.ON_HAND_UNITS ELSE 0 END) AS UNDERSTOCK_UNITS,
    COUNT(*) AS INVENTORY_RECORDS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_INVENTORY FI
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
    ON FI.STORE_KEY = DS.STORE_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
    ON FI.DATE_KEY = DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH
ORDER BY UNDERSTOCK_UNITS DESC;
businessContext: Store managers want to identify locations where inventory shortages frequently impact sales.
